<h1 align="center"> <br> <picture> <source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset=".github/logo-dark.svg"> <img width="160" alt="tsx" src=".github/logo-light.svg"> </picture> <br><br> <a href="https://npm.im/tsx"><img src="https://badgen.net/npm/v/tsx"></a> <a href="https://npm.im/tsx"><img src="https://badgen.net/npm/dm/tsx"></a> </h1> <p align="center"> TypeScript Execute (tsx): The easiest way to run TypeScript in Node.js <br><br> <a href="https://tsx.is">Documentation</a>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;|&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<a href="https://tsx.is/getting-started">Getting started →</a> </p> <br> <p align="center"> <a href="https://github.com/sponsors/privatenumber/sponsorships?tier_id=398771"><img width="412" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/privatenumber/sponsors/master/banners/assets/donate.webp"></a> <a href="https://github.com/sponsors/privatenumber/sponsorships?tier_id=416984"><img width="412" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/privatenumber/sponsors/master/banners/assets/sponsor.webp"></a> </p> <p align="center"><sup><i>Already a sponsor?</i> Join the discussion in the <a href="https://github.com/pvtnbr/tsx">Development repo</a>!</sup></p> ## Sponsors <p align="center"> <a href="https://github.com/sponsors/privatenumber"> <img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/privatenumber/sponsors/sponsorkit/sponsors.svg"> </a> </p>
